_note: 38 cases. setup = inverse of primary algorithm, applied to solved cube to reach the case state. All cases target the FR slot, white bottom, yellow top. f2l-06/07 removed (duplicates of f2l-01/02). f2l-41 removed (geometrically impossible; (R U R' U')x3 is an OLL trick, not F2L). Renumbered sequentially.

cases.name: Pair formed — insert right
cases.setup: R U R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are already paired together in the top layer. The white sticker of the corner faces away from the slot (toward R face). One U turn aligns the pair above the slot for insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R'

cases.name: Pair formed — insert left
cases.setup: F' U' F U
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are paired in the top layer. The white sticker faces away from the slot (toward F face). One U' turn aligns the pair for left-side insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U F

cases.name: Pair formed — AUF twice, insert right
cases.setup: R U R' U2
cases.recognition: Pair is formed and sitting at the back of the U layer. Two U turns align it for right-side insertion. Note: this is f2l-01 with a U2 AUF — the pair and case are identical, only the starting angle differs.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U2 R U' R'
algorithms.notes: U2 is AUF; R U' R' is the insertion trigger

cases.name: Pair formed — AUF twice, insert left
cases.setup: F' U' F U2
cases.recognition: Pair is formed and sitting at the back. Two U turns bring it to the left-side insertion position. Note: this is f2l-02 with a U2 AUF.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U2 F' U F
algorithms.notes: U2 is AUF; F' U F is the insertion trigger

cases.name: Both in top — white up, edge correct
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the U layer with the white sticker facing UP. Edge is in the top layer with its non-white color matching the center color below it (not flipped). The pair is not yet formed.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-23. Different starting positions (different category) converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R'

algorithms.label: Alt
algorithms.moves: F' U2 F U F' U' F
algorithms.notes: Mirror (use when approaching from F side)

cases.name: Both in top — white right, edge correct
cases.setup: R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the U layer with white facing the R face. Edge is in the top layer directly above the slot, correctly oriented. One trigger inserts the corner; the edge follows.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — white front, edge correct
cases.setup: F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner is in the U layer with white facing the F face. Edge is in the top layer, correctly oriented. A single F trigger handles the insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — white up, edge flipped
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing UP. Edge is in the top layer but flipped — its non-white color faces the wrong direction. The algorithm pairs them by exploiting the flip.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U2 R U' R'

algorithms.label: Alt
algorithms.moves: F' U' F U2 F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — white right, edge flipped
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing the R face. Edge is in the top layer but flipped. The longer sequence sets up a pair before inserting.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-24. Different starting positions converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — white front, edge flipped
cases.setup: F' U' F U F' U2 F U'
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing the F face. Edge is in the top layer, flipped. Setup moves bring the pieces into pairing position.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U F' U2 F U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — pair above wrong slot
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are above a slot that is not the FR slot. AUF aligns the pair over the correct slot before inserting. The pieces are correctly oriented relative to each other.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — white right, edge adjacent
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing R. Edge is in the top layer one position away from the corner. This 7-move sequence pairs and inserts.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-20 and f2l-31. These cases share an algorithm because different starting positions converge to the same intermediate cube state mid-sequence.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — white front, edge adjacent
cases.setup: F' U' F U F' U' F
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing F. Edge is in the top layer one position away. Mirror of f2l-12.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-32. Mirror pair of f2l-12 and f2l-20.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — white up, edge at back
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U2 R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner white facing up. Edge is at the back of the U layer, correctly oriented. Requires two setup U moves before the pairing trigger.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U2 R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — white up, edge flipped diagonal
cases.setup: F' U' F U2 R U R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner white facing up. Edge is flipped and positioned diagonally. The mixed R/F trigger sequence handles the awkward relative position.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R' U2 F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — white up, awkward diagonal
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U2 R'
cases.recognition: Corner white up, edge on the opposite side of the U layer. Both pieces need setup moves before they can pair.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top — corner front-right, edge front-left
cases.setup: R U' R' U F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner is above the FR slot. Edge is above the FL slot. They need to be brought together before insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U' F U' R U R'

cases.name: Both in top — corner right-back, edge front-right
cases.setup: F' U' F U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is above the BR slot. Edge is above the FR slot. Longer pairing path than the standard cases.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top — white up, edge at back-left
cases.setup: R U R' U2 F' U' F U'
cases.recognition: Corner white up above FR. Edge is at the back-left of the top layer. Multiple setup moves required before the R/F pairing sequence.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U F' U F U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot correct — edge in top correct
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner is already correctly placed in the FR slot (white on bottom). Edge is in the top layer and correctly oriented. Extract the corner, unite with edge, reinsert.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-12 and f2l-31. Different starting positions converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'
algorithms.notes: Extract corner, pair with edge, reinsert

cases.name: Corner in slot correct — edge in top flipped
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is correctly placed in the slot. Edge is in the top layer but flipped. The extraction sequence simultaneously fixes the edge flip.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot wrong orientation — edge correct
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the FR slot but misoriented (white sticker not on bottom). Edge is in the top layer correctly oriented. The longer sequence extracts, reorients, and reinserts the corner.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot wrong orientation — edge flipped
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R'
cases.recognition: Corner in slot, wrongly oriented. Edge in top layer, flipped. Both pieces need correction — the algorithm handles both in one sequence.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-05. Different starting positions (different category) converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot — edge at back-right
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the slot (any orientation). Edge is in the top layer at the back-right position. Requires AUF before extracting the corner.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-09. Different starting positions converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot — edge at front-left
cases.setup: F' U' F U F' U2 F U'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the slot. Edge is in the top layer at the front-left position. Mirror of f2l-24.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U2 F U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in slot — edge back-right, pair with U2
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner in slot. Edge at back-right but requiring U2 to align after extraction. Variant of f2l-24 with a different AUF.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot — edge front-left, pair with U2
cases.setup: F' U F U' F' U2 F U'
cases.recognition: Corner in slot. Edge at front-left position requiring extra U alignment. Mirror of f2l-26.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U2 F U F' U' F

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in slot correct
cases.setup: R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner is free in the U layer. Edge is already in the correct position in the middle layer, correctly oriented. Only 3 moves needed — just insert the corner.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in slot flipped
cases.setup: F' U' F
cases.recognition: Corner is free in the U layer. Edge is in the correct position but flipped. A single F trigger fixes the edge while inserting the corner.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in wrong slot
cases.setup: F' U' F U R U' R' U'
cases.recognition: Corner is free in the top layer. Edge is in a middle slot that is not the FR slot, correctly oriented. The algorithm extracts the edge while inserting the corner.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R' U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top white right — edge in wrong slot
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer, white facing the R face. Edge is in an adjacent wrong slot. The trigger extracts the edge and pairs it simultaneously.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-12 and f2l-20. Different starting positions converge to the same intermediate state.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top white front — edge in wrong slot
cases.setup: F' U' F U F' U' F
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer, white facing the F face. Edge in a wrong slot. Mirror of f2l-31.
cases.shared_algorithm_note: Same algorithm as f2l-13. Mirror pair of f2l-31.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in wrong slot flipped
cases.setup: R U R' U R U' R' U R U2 R'
cases.recognition: Corner free in the top layer. Edge is in a wrong slot AND flipped. The longer 11-move sequence handles extraction, flip correction, and insertion in one go.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
algorithms.notes: Consider extracting edge first as a two-step alternative

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in back-right slot
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U' R' U
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer. Edge is in the back-right (BR) middle slot. AUF first, then extract and insert.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top — edge in back-right slot flipped
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer. Edge is in the back-right slot but flipped. Shorter than f2l-33 because the slot position is more accessible.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Advanced — corner correct, edge in adjacent slot
cases.setup: R U R' U R U' R' U R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner is correctly placed in the FR slot. Edge is in a different middle slot (not FR). The 11-move sequence extracts the corner to pair with the edge, then reinserts both.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'

cases.name: Advanced — corner misoriented, edge in adjacent slot
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the FR slot but misoriented (white not on bottom). Edge is in a different middle slot. Both pieces need extracting and correcting.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Advanced — both in wrong slots
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Both corner and edge are in middle slots but neither is the correct FR slot. Requires extracting and relocating both pieces before pairing and inserting. The most complex standard F2L case.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U2 R' U R U' R'
algorithms.notes: Consider a two-step extraction approach for learning
